name: Four-Layer Lemon Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. First Layer: Mix all ingredients together and pat into a pie pan.
2. Bake in a preheated 400°F oven until browned, 8 to 10 minutes.
3. Second Layer: Beat together and pour into pie shell. Chill.
4. Third Layer: Mix until thickened and pour on cream cheese layer. Chill.
5. Fourth Layer: Cover pie with 4 oz whipped topping. Chill until serving time.
